result.summary: Found 2 issues: one major layout problem where the scroll prompt overlaps important footer text, and one minor content typo in the prompt label.

issues.description: The floating "SCROL DOWN" overlay sits on top of the small disclaimer/legal text at the bottom of the page, making that content hard to read.
issues.suggestion: Move the scroll prompt lower or hide it once the user reaches the lower section so it does not cover the fine print.

issues.description: The scroll prompt is misspelled as "SCROL DOWN" instead of "SCROLL DOWN".
issues.suggestion: Correct the label text to "SCROLL DOWN".
